1:from __future__ import annotations
3:import copy
4:from pathlib import Path
6:from agent.core import AgentConfig, ReActAgent
7:from agent.event_log import EventLog
8:from agent.policy import PhasePolicy
9:from agent.task import RunResult, RunStatus, Task
10:from agent.v2.agent_registry import AgentRegistryV2
11:from agent.v2.dynamic_registry import DynamicPolicyAwareToolRegistry
12:from agent.v2.models import ChildSessionResult
13:from agent.v2.session_store import SessionStore
14:from agent.v2.task_tool import TaskToolV2
15:from context.history import ConversationHistory
16:from llm.base import LLMBackend, LLMMessage
17:from tools.base import ToolRegistry
20:_DELEGATION_HINT_TOKENS = (
21:    "task",
22:    "subagent",
23:    "subagent_type",
24:    "child session",
25:    "explore",
26:    "general",
27:    "子会话",
28:    "子 session",
29:    "task 工具",
30:)
32:_CHILD_SUMMARY_RULE = (
33:    "Your final answer is returned to the parent as a summary-only tool result. "
34:    "The parent does not automatically inherit your full reasoning or full tool history. "
35:    "Make your final summary standalone and directly useful."
36:)
37:_DELEGATION_FALLBACK_DENY_TOOLS = frozenset({
38:    "file_read",
39:    "file_view",
40:    "find_files",
41:    "find_symbol",
42:    "search_text",
43:})
46:class SessionRuntime:
47:    def __init__(
48:        self,
49:        *,
50:        store: SessionStore,
51:        backend: LLMBackend,
52:        base_registry: ToolRegistry,
53:        agent_registry: AgentRegistryV2,
54:        root_agent_config: AgentConfig,
55:        log_dir: str,
56:        child_max_steps: int = 12,
57:        child_budget_tokens: int = 30_000,
58:        memory_context=None,
59:    ) -> None:
60:        self._store = store
61:        self._backend = backend
62:        self._base_registry = base_registry
63:        self._agent_registry = agent_registry
64:        self._root_agent_config = root_agent_config
65:        self._log_dir = log_dir
66:        self._child_max_steps = child_max_steps
67:        self._child_budget_tokens = child_budget_tokens
68:        self._memory_context = memory_context
69:        self._session_dynamic_denied_tools: dict[str, frozenset[str]] = {}
70:        self._active_registries: dict[str, DynamicPolicyAwareToolRegistry] = {}
72:    @property
73:    def agent_registry(self) -> AgentRegistryV2:
74:        return self._agent_registry
76:    def create_root_session(
77:        self,
78:        *,
79:        agent_name: str,
80:        repo_path: str,
81:        title: str,
82:        metadata: dict | None = None,
83:    ):
84:        spec = self._agent_registry.get(agent_name)
85:        return self._store.create_session(
86:            agent_name=agent_name,
87:            mode=spec.mode,
88:            repo_path=repo_path,
89:            title=title,
90:            metadata=metadata or {},
91:        )
93:    def run_session(
94:        self,
95:        session_id: str,
96:        *,
97:        agent_name: str,
98:        task_description: str,
99:        intent: str,
100:        messages: list[LLMMessage] | None = None,
101:    ) -> RunResult:
102:        session = self._store.get_session(session_id)
103:        if session is None:
104:            raise ValueError(f"Unknown v2 session: {session_id}")
106:        spec = self._agent_registry.get(agent_name)
107:        registry = self._build_registry_for_session(spec, session)
108:        agent_cfg = self._build_agent_config(spec)
109:        agent = ReActAgent(
110:            self._backend,
111:            registry,
112:            agent_cfg,
113:            memory_context=self._memory_context if spec.mode == "primary" else None,
114:        )
116:        persisted_messages = self._store.list_messages(session_id)
117:        if messages:
118:            for message in messages:
119:                self._store.append_message(session_id, message)
120:            persisted_messages = self._store.list_messages(session_id)
121:        elif not persisted_messages:
122:            self._store.append_message(session_id, LLMMessage(role="user", content=task_description))
123:            persisted_messages = self._store.list_messages(session_id)
125:        history = ConversationHistory(max_messages=agent_cfg.history_max_messages)
126:        injected_messages = self._build_runtime_messages(spec, task_description)
127:        history.add_many(injected_messages + persisted_messages)
128:        agent._pending_history = history
130:        task = Task(
131:            description=task_description,
132:            repo_path=session.repo_path,
133:            intent=intent,
134:            max_steps=agent_cfg.max_steps,
135:            budget_tokens=agent_cfg.budget_tokens,
136:            metadata={
137:                "entrypoint": "v2",
138:                "mode": f"v2-{agent_name}",
139:                "session_id": session_id,
140:                "parent_session_id": session.parent_id,
141:                "root_session_id": session.root_id,
142:                "agent_name": agent_name,
143:                "v2_bypass_path_scope_policy": True,
144:                "v2_disable_legacy_analysis_prompting": True,
145:            },
146:        )
148:        self._store.update_status(session_id, "running")
149:        initial_count = len(persisted_messages)
150:        try:
151:            with EventLog.create(task, log_dir=self._log_dir) as log:
152:                result = agent.run(task, log)
153:        finally:
154:            if spec.mode == "primary":
155:                self._active_registries.pop(session_id, None)
157:        for message in history.to_list()[initial_count:]:
158:            self._store.append_message(session_id, message)
160:        if result.is_success():
161:            self._store.set_summary(session_id, result.summary, status="completed")
162:        else:
163:            self._store.update_status(session_id, "failed", error=result.error or result.summary)
164:            self._store.set_summary(session_id, result.summary, status="failed")
165:        return result
167:    def run_child_session(
168:        self,
169:        *,
170:        parent_session_id: str,
171:        subagent_type: str,
172:        description: str,
173:        prompt: str,
174:    ) -> ChildSessionResult:
175:        parent = self._store.get_session(parent_session_id)
176:        if parent is None:
177:            raise ValueError(f"Unknown parent session: {parent_session_id}")
178:        spec = self._agent_registry.get(subagent_type)
179:        child = self._store.create_session(
180:            agent_name=subagent_type,
181:            mode=spec.mode,
182:            repo_path=parent.repo_path,
183:            title=f"{description} (@{subagent_type} subagent)",
184:            parent_id=parent.id,
185:            root_id=parent.root_id,
186:            metadata={
187:                "task_description": description,
188:                "subagent_type": subagent_type,
189:                "run_kind": "task_child",
190:            },
191:        )
192:        result = self.run_session(
193:            child.id,
194:            agent_name=subagent_type,
195:            task_description=prompt,
196:            intent="analysis" if subagent_type == "explore" else "edit",
197:            messages=[LLMMessage(role="user", content=prompt)],
198:        )
199:        return self._build_child_session_result(child.id, result)
201:    def _build_registry_for_session(self, spec, session) -> ToolRegistry:
202:        registry = self._base_registry.filtered(spec.allowed_tools)
203:        if spec.allow_task_tool:
204:            registry.register(TaskToolV2(self, session.id))
205:        dynamic_denied_tools = self._session_dynamic_denied_tools.get(session.id, frozenset())
206:        wrapped = DynamicPolicyAwareToolRegistry(
207:            base=registry,
208:            phase_policy=PhasePolicy(allowed_tools=frozenset(registry.tool_names)),
209:            repo_path=session.repo_path,
210:            phase_name="v2_execution",
211:            dynamic_denied_tools=dynamic_denied_tools,
212:        )
213:        if spec.mode == "primary":
214:            self._active_registries[session.id] = wrapped
215:        return wrapped
217:    def _build_agent_config(self, spec) -> AgentConfig:
218:        cfg = copy.copy(self._root_agent_config)
219:        if spec.mode != "primary":
220:            cfg.max_steps = self._child_max_steps
221:            cfg.budget_tokens = self._child_budget_tokens
222:            cfg.compact_history = False
223:            cfg.stream = False
224:            cfg.stream_callback = None
225:            cfg.thought_callback = None
226:        return cfg
228:    def _build_runtime_messages(self, spec, task_description: str) -> list[LLMMessage]:
229:        if spec.mode == "subagent":
230:            return self._build_child_runtime_messages(spec)
231:        if spec.mode != "primary":
232:            return []
233:        messages = [
234:            LLMMessage(
235:                role="user",
236:                content=(
237:                    "[V2 Primary Session Rule]\n"
238:                    "When you use the task tool, treat the child session result as authoritative structured data.\n"
239:                    "- If a child session returns status=partial or status=failed, do NOT perform the child's "
240:                    "exploration or file-reading work yourself.\n"
241:                    "- Instead, dispatch a new, more specific child session to fill the missing parts, or ask the "
242:                    "user for clarification if the missing scope is ambiguous.\n"
243:                    "- Only do direct file exploration yourself if the user explicitly changes strategy."
244:                ),
245:            )
246:        ]
247:        if not self._is_explicit_delegation_request(task_description):
248:            return messages
249:        messages.append(
250:            LLMMessage(
251:                role="user",
252:                content=(
253:                    "[V2 Delegation Rule]\n"
254:                    "The user explicitly asked you to use the task tool / child session model. "
255:                    "Your first meaningful action must be a task tool call that delegates the requested "
256:                    "exploration or implementation to the appropriate subagent. "
257:                    "Do not do your own substantive file exploration before that first task call. "
258:                    "After the child session returns, treat its summary as your primary source. "
259:                    "Do not repeat broad exploration unless the child summary is clearly insufficient. "
260:                    "If the child result is insufficient, dispatch another more specific child session instead of "
261:                    "doing the broad exploration yourself."
262:                ),
263:            ),
264:        )
265:        return messages
267:    def _is_explicit_delegation_request(self, task_description: str) -> bool:
268:        lowered = (task_description or "").lower()
269:        return any(token in lowered for token in _DELEGATION_HINT_TOKENS)
271:    def _build_child_runtime_messages(self, spec) -> list[LLMMessage]:
272:        if spec.name == "explore":
273:            content = (
274:                "[V2 Child Session Rule]\n"
275:                "You are an isolated explore child session. Complete the exploration yourself instead of "
276:                "leaving obvious follow-up work for the parent.\n"
277:                "- Prefer targeted search + focused reads over broad wandering.\n"
278:                "- Stop as soon as you can name the key files, functions, and call flow.\n"
279:                "- Your final summary must include: files inspected, the main execution path, and any "
280:                "specific gaps that remain.\n"
281:                f"- {_CHILD_SUMMARY_RULE}"
282:            )
283:        else:
284:            content = (
285:                "[V2 Child Session Rule]\n"
286:                "You are an isolated general child session. Try to complete the requested implementation "
287:                "or focused investigation yourself before handing back control.\n"
288:                "- Keep your work scoped to the requested task.\n"
289:                "- If you finish successfully, summarize the concrete changes or findings.\n"
290:                "- If you cannot finish, summarize the blocker precisely.\n"
291:                f"- {_CHILD_SUMMARY_RULE}"
292:            )
293:        return [LLMMessage(role="user", content=content)]
295:    def _build_child_session_result(self, session_id: str, result: RunResult) -> ChildSessionResult:
296:        session = self._store.get_session(session_id)
297:        messages = self._store.list_messages(session_id)
298:        artifacts = self._extract_child_artifacts(messages)
299:        status = self._map_child_status(result.status)
300:        summary = (result.summary or "").strip()
301:        if not summary:
302:            summary = "Child session finished without a summary."
303:        missing_info = self._child_missing_info(status, result)
304:        error = (result.error or "").strip()
305:        if session is not None and session.error and not error:
306:            error = session.error.strip()
307:        return ChildSessionResult(
308:            session_id=session_id,
309:            status=status,
310:            summary=summary,
311:            artifacts=tuple(artifacts),
312:            missing_info=missing_info,
313:            error=error,
314:        )
316:    def apply_child_result_policy(self, parent_session_id: str, child_result: ChildSessionResult) -> None:
317:        if child_result.status not in {"partial", "failed"}:
318:            return
319:        denied_tools = self._session_dynamic_denied_tools.get(parent_session_id, frozenset())
320:        next_denied = frozenset(set(denied_tools) | set(_DELEGATION_FALLBACK_DENY_TOOLS))
321:        self._session_dynamic_denied_tools[parent_session_id] = next_denied
322:        active_registry = self._active_registries.get(parent_session_id)
323:        if active_registry is not None:
324:            active_registry.set_dynamic_denied_tools(next_denied)
326:    def _extract_child_artifacts(self, messages: list[LLMMessage]) -> list[str]:
327:        artifact_paths: list[str] = []
328:        seen: set[str] = set()
329:        for message in messages:
330:            if message.role != "assistant" or not message.tool_calls:
331:                continue
332:            for tool_call in message.tool_calls:
333:                for key in ("path", "file_path", "target_path", "new_path"):
334:                    value = tool_call.params.get(key)
335:                    if not isinstance(value, str):
336:                        continue
337:                    normalized = value.strip()
338:                    if not normalized or normalized in seen:
339:                        continue
340:                    seen.add(normalized)
341:                    artifact_paths.append(normalized)
342:        return artifact_paths
344:    def _map_child_status(self, run_status: RunStatus) -> str:
345:        if run_status == RunStatus.SUCCESS:
346:            return "completed"
347:        if run_status == RunStatus.MAX_STEPS:
348:            return "partial"
349:        return "failed"
351:    def _child_missing_info(self, status: str, result: RunResult) -> str:
352:        if status == "completed":
353:            return ""
354:        if status == "partial":
355:            return (
356:                (result.error or "").strip()
357:                or "Child session stopped before fully covering the requested scope."
358:            )
359:        return (
360:            (result.error or "").strip()
361:            or (result.summary or "").strip()
362:            or "Child session failed before producing a complete result."
363:        )
366:def default_session_db_path(repo_path: str) -> str:
367:    return str(Path(repo_path) / ".forge-agent" / "v2" / "sessions.db")
